description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise with a sleek, minimalist design and a uniform cream-colored finish. The structure features two wide, flat seat cushions and two matching rectangular backrest cushions, all with smooth, unadorned surfaces. The armrests are thick, straight, and extend the full depth of the seat, giving the piece a solid, geometric appearance. The back and sides are fully enclosed with no visible legs, contributing to a monolithic, block-like silhouette. The upholstery appears to be a glossy, synthetic leather or vinyl, lending a slightly reflective sheen to the surface. The overall look is contemporary and utilitarian, suitable for urban public spaces or modern interiors.
description: A modern, cream-colored chaise with a boxy silhouette, thick armrests, and smooth, glossy upholstery. It features two seat and two backrest cushions, all with a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two wide seat cushions, two matching backrest cushions, and thick armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the armrest and the slight backward angle of the backrest cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, solid back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of two large, rectangular cushions with a slight backward tilt and smooth, unembellished surfaces. There are no visible decorative elements, tufting, or segmentation beyond the division into two separate cushions.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, appearing as thick, rectangular blocks that extend the full depth of the seat.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed with a solid, box-like construction that sits directly on the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid cream in color with a smooth, glossy finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all placed side by side. The cushions appear to be attached or closely fitted, with no loose or layered arrangement.
